note: Implemented all four data freshness features: (1) FreshnessIndicator widget showing 'Updated X minutes ago' with 60s auto-refresh timer, (2) amber styling on StaleDataBanner when data >1 hour old, (3) OfflineBanner widget with connectivity_plus-backed connectivityProvider, (4) both HomeScreen and UpcomingScreen updated with offline banner, stale banner, and freshness indicator.
